summary: Complete RBAC testing for AI Hotel Assistant platform. All 23 backend tests pass (100%). All 6 roles tested via UI with correct navigation items and role labels displayed. Login API returns correct role, allowed_pages, and allowed_features for each role. /api/auth/me endpoint working correctly.

minor.issue: Non-management roles (front_desk, housekeeping, restaurant) get 403 on analytics endpoints which is EXPECTED behavior - RBAC is working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 6 roles show correct nav items and labels)

seed_data_creation: All 6 test accounts already seeded in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC fully tested. All login flows working with correct permissions. Admin sees 7 nav items (A2A Dashboard, Guest Chat, Staff Assistant, Intelligence, Admin Panel, Operations, Analytics). Manager sees 6 items (no Admin Panel). Front Desk sees 4 items (A2A Dashboard, Guest Chat, Staff Assistant, Operations). Housekeeping and Restaurant see 2 items (Staff Assistant, Operations). Guest sees 1 item (Guest Chat). Role labels display correctly in sidebar for all roles.

features_verified.quick_login_buttons_work: PASS - All 6 quick login buttons functional
features_verified.role_labels_in_sidebar: PASS - Administrator, Manager, Front Desk, Housekeeping, Restaurant, Guest all displayed correctly
features_verified.auth_me_endpoint: PASS - Returns correct permissions for all roles
